No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links psychological testing to poverty eradication.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly covers psychological testing applications in 'clinical and counseling' (臨床與諮商), directly supporting mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course teaches 'reliability,' 'validity,' and 'data collection/sampling methods,' which are fundamental for producing high-quality data essential for monitoring SDG progress (Target 17.18).
